text.title: trunk-based-feature-flags Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for trunk-based-feature-flags as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Hard-coding is_enabled(..., default=True) during local development and shipping it to CI without reverting.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The flag is effectively dead — gate via env (FLAGS_DEFAULT=off in CI) and grep for literal is_enabled(... True) in code review. Agents forget to revert defaults frequently.

failure-mode.description: Skipping the try/except around the dark-launch call because "the new implementation should not throw".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Any unhandled exception in the shadow path propagates to the caller, breaking the current result. Dark launch must be hermetically isolated from the production path at all costs.
